## Command to rerun (copy/paste)
```powershell
`$json = Get-Content -Raw 'content/readiness/readiness_status.json' | ConvertFrom-Json
$plan = Get-Content -Raw 'docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-s23-plus-s33-work-completion-roadmap.md'
$nonReadySubsystems = @($json.subsystems | Where-Object { $_.status -ne 'READY' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty id)
$nonReadyTemplates = @($json.templates | Where-Object { $_.status -ne 'READY' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty id)
$missingSubsystems = @($nonReadySubsystems | Where-Object { $plan -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_) })
$missingTemplates = @($nonReadyTemplates | Where-Object { $plan -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_) })
Write-Output \"Subsystems not mapped: $($missingSubsystems.Count)\"
Write-Output \"Templates not mapped: $($missingTemplates.Count)\"
```
